name: prospi-mcp
description: MCP server for Prospi AI - manage campaigns, sequences and leads via Claude/Cursor

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts src/client.ts src/tools/campaigns.ts src/tools/sequences.ts src/tools/leads.ts src/tools/lists.ts src/tools/dnc.ts src/tools/domains.ts --bundle=false --platform=node --target=node18 --outdir=dist --format=cjs
